name: Bugsnag
description: Read & triage Bugsnag (now SmartBear Insight Hub) errors, projects, organizations, releases, pivots from any AI agent. 9 tools, token auth.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Bugsnag Data Access API (api.bugsnag.com).

**Setup**:
1. Log into https://app.bugsnag.com → bottom-left profile → **My Account → Personal Auth Tokens** → Generate.
2. Pick the scopes you need (`project errors`, `project events`, `project release groups`, `project comments`, `project pivots`).
3. Set `BUGSNAG_AUTH_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: every request sends `Authorization: token ${BUGSNAG_AUTH_TOKEN}` AND `X-Version: 2`. The adapter wires both for you.

**Hierarchy**: `Organization → Project → Error → Event(s)`. An "Error" is the deduplicated group; "Events" are the individual occurrences with stack trace + breadcrumbs + user. To get useful debug info you usually want the latest event of an error.

**Bootstrapping the IDs**:
1. `bugsnag_list_organizations` → grab `org_id`.
2. `bugsnag_list_projects` → grab `project_id`.
3. `bugsnag_list_errors` → grab `error_id`.
4. `bugsnag_get_event` → full stack trace.

**Filter syntax**: error/event list endpoints accept `filters[field][type][operator]=value` repeated. Common: `filters[event.since][][type]=eq&filters[event.since][][value]=7d` (last 7 days), `filters[error.status][][type]=eq&filters[error.status][][value]=open`. Stick to a few common patterns in tool args — full grammar lives at https://bugsnagapiv2.docs.apiary.io/.

**Rate limits**: 60 req/min per token, 5k/hour. 429 with `Retry-After` header.

**Out of scope here**: project CRUD, account billing, integrations setup, deploys via REST (use the dedicated build reporter SDK instead).

tools.name: bugsnag_current_user
tools.description: Return the user account the token belongs to: id, name, email, created_at.

tools.name: bugsnag_list_organizations
tools.description: List orgs the user belongs to. Each has id, name, slug, billing/plan info, creator. Most users have exactly one.

tools.name: bugsnag_list_projects
tools.description: List projects inside an org. Returns id, slug, name, api_key, type (e.g. js, node, ruby), open_error_count, urls.

tools.name: bugsnag_list_errors
tools.description: List errors in a project. Errors are deduplicated stack-trace groups. Each has id, error_class, message, context, status (open/fixed/snoozed/ignored), severity, events count, users count, first_seen, last_seen.

filters_status.description: Shortcut filter by status: open, fixed, snoozed, ignored. Internally adds filters[error.status].

filters_since.description: Shortcut filter by time window, e.g. '7d', '24h', '1m'. Internally adds filters[event.since].

tools.name: bugsnag_get_error
tools.description: Get a single error by ID with its full metadata, severity, status, top stack frame.

tools.name: bugsnag_list_events
tools.description: List events (individual occurrences) for an error. Each event has the full stack, breadcrumbs, user context, device info.

full_reports.description: If true, include full stack + breadcrumbs in each event (slower).

tools.name: bugsnag_get_event
tools.description: Get a single event by ID — full stack trace, breadcrumbs, user, app, device, request, custom metadata. This is the most useful tool for debugging.

tools.name: bugsnag_update_error
tools.description: Update the status/severity of an error: fix, ignore, snooze, reopen, change severity.

tools.name: bugsnag_list_releases
tools.description: List releases for a project. Useful for cross-referencing an error spike with a deploy.
